payload.title: Score Results Report runs predictions for specified item identifiers
payload.description:
As a lab operator, I want a report that runs predictions for a provided list of item identifiers on one score or an entire scorecard, so that I can review current prediction outcomes quickly.

Feature: Score Results Report

Scenario: Scorecard scope predicts all scores for all resolved identifiers
Given a required scorecard identifier and a list of item identifiers
And the score parameter is not provided
When the report runs
Then it resolves each identifier to an item id when possible
And it runs predictions for each resolved item across all scores on the scorecard
And it persists prediction score results
And it returns output grouped by score

Scenario: Single-score scope predicts one score for all resolved identifiers
Given a required scorecard identifier, an optional score identifier, and a list of item identifiers
When the report runs
Then it resolves the score within the scorecard
And it runs predictions only for that score across resolved items
And it persists prediction score results
And it returns output grouped by score

Scenario: Unresolved identifiers are reported without failing the report
Given at least one provided identifier cannot be resolved to an item
When the report runs
Then it continues predicting for resolvable identifiers
And it includes unresolved identifiers in diagnostics
And report execution succeeds if at least one prediction succeeds

Scenario: CLI accepts both list styles for identifiers
Given a scorecard identifier
When the user runs score-results-report with --ids comma-separated values
Or the user repeats --id multiple times
Then the report receives one normalized ids list
And at least one identifier is required

Scenario: Detailed prediction payload is returned per item-score run
Given a prediction run completes for an item and score
When output is generated
Then each result includes status, score_result_id, value, explanation, cost, and trace when available
And failed predictions include error details
